topic: Custom AI vs. SaaS Tools: Which Is Right for Your Business and When?

manual_inputs.Topic: Custom AI vs. SaaS Tools: Which Is Right for Your Business and When?
manual_inputs.Secondary Keywords:
custom AI vs SaaS automation	
custom AI solution vs off-the-shelf · when to build custom AI · AI automation agency vs software tool · Zapier alternatives for growing business
manual_inputs.Target Persona: Marcus T. (Startup Founder, hit Zapier ceiling) + Priya S. (Ops Manager, evaluating options for board proposal). Dual-persona article — both are in evaluation mode.
manual_inputs.Angle / Hook: Honest, balanced comparison that earns trust by presenting both sides fairly — then shows clearly where the threshold is. Not a hit piece on SaaS. Position as: 'SaaS is right for simple, standard workflows. Custom AI is right when your business is specific, scaling, or has outgrown templates.' Arsuno.ai enters naturally as the example of custom-done-right.
manual_inputs.Internal Links: All 5 Arsuno.ai feature pages · Discovery call page · Delivery process section
manual_inputs.Notes: Include a comparison table (SaaS vs Custom vs Freelancer vs Enterprise Consultancy). This is Arsuno.ai's pillar differentiation piece — it should be comprehensive and evergreen. Reference 'Zapier', 'HubSpot', 'off-the-shelf chatbots' by name to capture comparison searches. Arsuno.ai positioning: faster than enterprise consultancies (1–2 week onboarding vs 3–6 months), more capable than SaaS (custom-built), more reliable than freelancers (agency accountability + long-term partnership).
